creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
to use audio/clementine-player i have to start it alwys two times.

the first time i got this output:

12:28:12.568 WARN  unknown                          QxtGlobalShortcut failed to register: "Media Next"  
12:28:12.569 WARN  unknown                          QxtGlobalShortcut failed to register: "Media Play"  
12:28:12.569 WARN  unknown                          QxtGlobalShortcut failed to register: "Media Previous"  
12:28:12.570 WARN  unknown                          QxtGlobalShortcut failed to register: "Media Stop"  
++ WARN: ioctl(fd, CDIOCALLOW) failed: Device not configured


after a start - on another shell(!) it comes up.

How-To-Repeat: start audio/clementine-player
